home.heroSubtitle: Connect with top recruiters and companies across Peru. Build your talent profile and unlock real opportunities.
home.heroFeatures: ✓ Free forever · ✓ 2 minutes to set up · ✓ Full control over your data
home.professionalVisibilityDesc: Showcase your skills, experience, and potential to recruiters from leading companies actively seeking talent.
home.directConnectionsDesc: Get discovered by partner companies and recruiters looking for students from your university and field of study.
home.careerOpportunitiesDesc: Access internships, mentorship programs, and networking events designed to accelerate your professional growth.
home.completeControlDesc: Your profile is only shared with recruiters when you explicitly opt in. You can update your preferences or opt out at any time.
home.dataPrivacy: ✓ Your data is never sold or shared without permission
home.transparency: ✓ Full transparency on who views your profile
